name: Sauteed Prawns (Tahiti)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the prawns thoroughly, breaking off any long feelers or legs.
2. Fry the chopped onion in a heavy frying pan until golden brown.
3. Add the prawns to the pan and cook until they turn red.
4. Season with salt and red pepper.
5. Pour in 1 glass of water or white wine.
6. Add the crushed garlic cloves and a light sprinkling of paprika.
7. Cover the pan and allow it to simmer for about 5 minutes.
8. Check the seasoning, sprinkle over the fresh parsley, and serve hot.
